markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review pod updates and discuss a new content strategy for Augment.](https://fathom.video/share/ELpibGzoTDMCbRzx3fnsZk5CW9V5sqvW?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Augment Content Pivot:** Shifting from 30 new articles/week to refreshing \~100 underperforming articles. This prioritizes quality to reverse declining search traffic and improve rankings.](https://fathom.video/share/ELpibGzoTDMCbRzx3fnsZk5CW9V5sqvW?tab=summary&timestamp=1665.0)
  - [**Webflow Upsell Strategy:** Proposing a "capacity-based" upsell (e.g., adding a workstream) to bypass client disorganization and meet their urgent timeline, rather than a fixed-scope project.](https://fathom.video/share/ELpibGzoTDMCbRzx3fnsZk5CW9V5sqvW?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
  - [**Domain Expert Pipeline:** Actively building a pipeline of external reviewers for Webflow, Augment, and Data Annotation content to unblock production and ensure technical accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/ELpibGzoTDMCbRzx3fnsZk5CW9V5sqvW?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)
  - [**Meeting Cadence:** This weekly pod sync will become a monthly executive vision-setting meeting, replaced by more focused, account-specific syncs.](https://fathom.video/share/ELpibGzoTDMCbRzx3fnsZk5CW9V5sqvW?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)

## Topics

### Augment: Content Strategy Pivot

  - [**Problem:** Search traffic is declining despite a 30-article/week cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/ELpibGzoTDMCbRzx3fnsZk5CW9V5sqvW?tab=summary&timestamp=1981.0)
      - [**Root Cause:** Quality issues (outdated info, poor SEO) are causing articles to lose rank in Google Search Console.](https://fathom.video/share/ELpibGzoTDMCbRzx3fnsZk5CW9V5sqvW?tab=summary&timestamp=1998.0)
  - [**Solution:** Pivot from new content to refreshing \~100 underperforming articles.](https://fathom.video/share/ELpibGzoTDMCbRzx3fnsZk5CW9V5sqvW?tab=summary&timestamp=1665.0)
      - [**Goal:** Improve quality and boost search performance.](https://fathom.video/share/ELpibGzoTDMCbRzx3fnsZk5CW9V5sqvW?tab=summary&timestamp=1665.0)
      - [**Process:** Use Marisol's improved workflows to rewrite articles under their existing URLs, requiring new redirects for updated slugs.](https://fathom.video/share/ELpibGzoTDMCbRzx3fnsZk5CW9V5sqvW?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)
      - [**Cadence:** Reduce volume to a sustainable pace (e.g., 15 refreshes/week) to ensure quality.](https://fathom.video/share/ELpibGzoTDMCbRzx3fnsZk5CW9V5sqvW?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)
  - [**Communication:** Nathalie will draft a proposal for Saul explaining the "why" (performance decline) and the "what" (pivot to refreshes).](https://fathom.video/share/ELpibGzoTDMCbRzx3fnsZk5CW9V5sqvW?tab=summary&timestamp=2386.0)

### Webflow: Upsell Strategy

  - [**Opportunity:** Webflow wants to expand our engagement but is disorganized, creating a bottleneck.](https://fathom.video/share/ELpibGzoTDMCbRzx3fnsZk5CW9V5sqvW?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [**Client Need:** A code-first developer marketplace (similar to Tailscale) to complement their low-code Designer.](https://fathom.video/share/ELpibGzoTDMCbRzx3fnsZk5CW9V5sqvW?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
  - [**Proposed Strategy:** A "capacity-based" upsell.](https://fathom.video/share/ELpibGzoTDMCbRzx3fnsZk5CW9V5sqvW?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This approach is more flexible and can be implemented faster than a fixed-scope project, addressing their urgent timeline.](https://fathom.video/share/ELpibGzoTDMCbRzx3fnsZk5CW9V5sqvW?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [**Strategic Goal (6-month):** Replace competitor Graphite by targeting their monitoring product and SEO content.](https://fathom.video/share/ELpibGzoTDMCbRzx3fnsZk5CW9V5sqvW?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)

### Domain Expert Reviewers

  - [**Need:** External reviewers are required for technical accuracy and to unblock content production.](https://fathom.video/share/ELpibGzoTDMCbRzx3fnsZk5CW9V5sqvW?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)
  - [**Hiring Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/ELpibGzoTDMCbRzx3fnsZk5CW9V5sqvW?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)
      - [**Webflow & Augment:** Edin can provide interim reviews. Marilia will source candidates via Upwork.](https://fathom.video/share/ELpibGzoTDMCbRzx3fnsZk5CW9V5sqvW?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)
      - [**Data Annotation:** Liz will scope the profile (code tester) with the EPD channel.](https://fathom.video/share/ELpibGzoTDMCbRzx3fnsZk5CW9V5sqvW?tab=summary&timestamp=1370.0)
      - [**DevRel (Search):** Sourcing requires engineering help or network outreach.](https://fathom.video/share/ELpibGzoTDMCbRzx3fnsZk5CW9V5sqvW?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)

### Augment: CLI Workflows

  - [**Status:** Augment delivered 47 new CLI commands, adding to our initial 40.](https://fathom.video/share/ELpibGzoTDMCbRzx3fnsZk5CW9V5sqvW?tab=summary&timestamp=776.0)
  - [**Path Forward:**](https://fathom.video/share/ELpibGzoTDMCbRzx3fnsZk5CW9V5sqvW?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
    1.  [Address Phil's website comments.](https://fathom.video/share/ELpibGzoTDMCbRzx3fnsZk5CW9V5sqvW?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
    2.  [Upload new commands to Sanity.](https://fathom.video/share/ELpibGzoTDMCbRzx3fnsZk5CW9V5sqvW?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)
    3.  [Plan the next batch of 100-200 workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/ELpibGzoTDMCbRzx3fnsZk5CW9V5sqvW?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
    4.  [**Decision:** Use a simple Anthropic workbench for manual generation to avoid a 2-week engineering delay.](https://fathom.video/share/ELpibGzoTDMCbRzx3fnsZk5CW9V5sqvW?tab=summary&timestamp=884.0)

### Process & Cadence

  - [**Meeting Cadence:** This sync will become a monthly executive vision-setting meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/ELpibGzoTDMCbRzx3fnsZk5CW9V5sqvW?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [**New Syncs:** Account-specific syncs (Webflow, Augment, Search) are now scheduled.](https://fathom.video/share/ELpibGzoTDMCbRzx3fnsZk5CW9V5sqvW?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [**Reddit Strategy:** Jason will create a one-pager on a new Reddit monitoring and posting workflow, which will be rolled out to all accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/ELpibGzoTDMCbRzx3fnsZk5CW9V5sqvW?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)

      - [Async with Saul to provide context for tomorrow's sync.](https://fathom.video/share/ELpibGzoTDMCbRzx3fnsZk5CW9V5sqvW?tab=summary&timestamp=2360.0)

      - [Create the Reddit strategy one-pager.](https://fathom.video/share/ELpibGzoTDMCbRzx3fnsZk5CW9V5sqvW?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
  - [**Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/ELpibGzoTDMCbRzx3fnsZk5CW9V5sqvW?tab=summary&timestamp=2119.0)
      - [Begin Augment content refreshes using improved workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/ELpibGzoTDMCbRzx3fnsZk5CW9V5sqvW?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)
      - [Address Phil's comments and upload new commands for the Augment CLI.](https://fathom.video/share/ELpibGzoTDMCbRzx3fnsZk5CW9V5sqvW?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
